name: NSW Bridge Assets — NHVR Permit Assessment Dataset

metadata.title: NSW Bridge Asset Register — NHVR Permit Assessment
metadata.description: 150 NSW bridge assets with NHVR-relevant attributes for permit route assessment
metadata.disclaimer: Demonstration dataset. Not for operational permit decisions. Verify via official NHVR channels.
